pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh confirm this is the assumed today's date for evaluating expirations.
Task description and verifier.py logic check for the creation of 'External Contractors' department.
Manual comparison of ContractEndDate from the generated CSV against the target date 2026-03-11. Their dates are 2026-02-15, 2026-02-28, 2026-03-01, and 2025-12-31 respectively.
Manual comparison of ContractEndDate from the generated CSV against the target date 2026-03-11. Their dates are 2026-12-31, 2026-08-15, 2026-09-01, and 2027-01-15 respectively.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated contractor data seeded via setup_task.sh. Based on the target date of 2026-03-11, four contractors (EMP031, EMP032, EMP034, EMP037) have expired ContractEndDates in the CSV, while the remaining four contractors (EMP033, EMP035, EMP036, EMP038) are active. The verifier checks that expired contractors are deactivated and active contractors are reassigned to a newly created 'External Contractors' department, matching the explicit task instructions and scoring weights.
